justifications.clarity: context box and comparison tables make kernel-level security distinctions scannable; all technical terms defined on first use.
justifications.rigor: Three citations (openai2025codex, openai2026gpt55, linux2022landlock) cover adoption stats, model launch, and Landlock LSM; kernel mechanism descriptions match official documentation.
justifications.completeness: All 8 planned sections covered including cloud sandbox execution, multi-surface architecture, computer use, cost management, and a finance-specific decision guide.
justifications.pedagogy: Seven measurable learning objectives stated upfront; /plan→/exec→/review structured loop illustrated in worked Example B.1; decision guide table operationalises tool selection.
justifications.style: Consistent with book LaTeX conventions throughout; uses context and deepdive environments; booktabs tables; British English spelling unified.
